log_activity_formula_desc: MET ({met}) Ã— your weight ({weight} kg) Ã— duration = calories burned. This uses the standard metabolic equivalent formula used by MyFitnessPal and Cronometer.
adj_consistency_note: Your eating pattern is consistent, so this isn't random.
adj_reason_cal_down: You've averaged {avg} kcal over {days} days — {pct}% of your {target} kcal goal. {note} A realistic target builds sustainable habits.
adj_reason_cal_up: You're averaging {avg} kcal — {pct}% over your {target} kcal target. Your actual intake is your real baseline.
adj_reason_cal_muscle: You're eating {avg} kcal — a healthy surplus for muscle gain. Aligning your target lets you track surplus vs. goal more accurately.
adj_reason_prot_down: You're hitting {avg}g protein — {pct}% of your {target}g target. A stepping-stone target of {suggested}g gives you wins while you build the habit.
adj_reason_prot_up: You're consistently hitting {avg}g protein — {pct}% of target. Your muscles have adapted. A progressive increase to {suggested}g can stimulate further gains.
adj_reason_carbs_down_loss: You're averaging {avg}g carbs — {pct}% over your {target}g target. For weight loss, managing carbs closely matters.
adj_reason_carbs_down_maintain: You're averaging {avg}g carbs — {pct}% over your {target}g target. For maintenance, managing carbs closely matters.
adj_reason_fat_adjust: Your fat intake averages {avg}g — only {pct}% of your {target}g target. Healthy fats support hormones, vitamins, and satiety.
adj_reason_on_track: Analyzed {days} days of data — your macro averages are all within healthy ranges of your goals. Keep up the consistency!
adj_impact_cal_down: Expected adherence improvement: ~{pct}%. Easier to hit, easier to track progress.
adj_impact_cal_up: Sets a realistic ceiling. Makes over-eating more visible and trackable.
adj_impact_cal_muscle: Surplus tracking becomes more precise, helping you avoid unintentional fat gain.
adj_impact_prot_down: Higher perceived achievement. After 2-4 weeks of hitting {suggested}g, you can step up again.
adj_impact_prot_up: Muscle protein synthesis peaks with ~2.0-2.2g/kg body weight. Increasing provides a new growth stimulus.
adj_impact_carbs_down: A {reduction}g reduction cuts ~{kcal} kcal from carb sources.
adj_impact_fat_adjust: Aligning your target makes fat tracking meaningful and prevents ignoring this macro.
adj_impact_on_track: Maintaining current intake and logging habits will help you reach your goal on schedule.

terms_acceptance_desc: By accessing or using NutriBox ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our Service. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time, and your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any modifications.
terms_description_desc: NutriBox is a meal planning and delivery platform that connects users with restaurant partners to provide healthy, nutritionally-balanced meals. Our Service includes meal scheduling, nutritional tracking, subscription management, and delivery coordination.
terms_registration_desc: To use our Service, you must:
terms_registration_req1: Be at least 18 years of age
terms_registration_req2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms_registration_req3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms_registration_req4: Promptly update any changes to your information
terms_registration_req5: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
terms_registration_note: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms_subscriptions_41: 4.1 Subscription Plans: We offer various subscription plans with different meal allowances and pricing. Plan details are available on our website.
terms_subscriptions_42: 4.2 Billing: Subscription fees are billed in advance on a weekly or monthly basis, depending on your selected plan. All fees are non-refundable except as expressly stated.
terms_subscriptions_43: 4.3 Auto-Renewal: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. You may cancel at any time through your account settings.
terms_subscriptions_44: 4.4 Price Changes: We reserve the right to modify pricing with reasonable notice. Existing subscribers will be notified of any price changes before their next billing cycle.
terms_orders_51: 5.1 Order Placement: Orders must be placed within your subscription's meal allowance. Once an order is confirmed, modifications may be limited.
terms_orders_52: 5.2 Delivery: We strive to deliver meals at the scheduled time. Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to circumstances beyond our control.
terms_orders_53: 5.3 Cancellations: Order cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the scheduled delivery time. Late cancellations may result in forfeiture of the meal credit.
terms_health_61: 6.1 Not Medical Advice: Our nutritional information and recommendations are for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before making significant dietary changes.
terms_health_62: 6.2 Allergens: While we strive to accommodate dietary restrictions, we cannot guarantee that meals are free from allergens. If you have severe allergies, please contact us before ordering.
terms_health_63: 6.3 Nutritional Accuracy: Nutritional information is provided by our restaurant partners and may vary. Values are approximate and should be used as guidelines.
terms_conduct_req1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
terms_conduct_req3: Interfere with or disrupt the Service
terms_conduct_req4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms_conduct_req6: Harass or abuse restaurant partners or delivery personnel
terms_conduct_req7: Resell or commercially exploit the Service
terms_ip_desc: All content, trademarks, and intellectual property on our platform are owned by NutriBox or our licensors. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written consent.
terms_liability_desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, NutriBox shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the Service in the preceding 12 months.
terms_warranties_desc: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.
terms_indemnification_desc: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless NutriBox, its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.
terms_dispute_desc: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with applicable arbitration rules. You waive any right to participate in class action lawsuits.
terms_law_desc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which NutriBox operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms_severability_desc: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms_contact_desc: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
terms_address: Address: 123 Healthy Street, Wellness City, WC 12345

faq_getting_started_q1: How do I create an account?
faq_getting_started_a1: Creating an account is easy! Click 'Get Started' on our homepage, complete the onboarding questionnaire about your health goals, body metrics, and dietary preferences, and you'll have your personalized nutrition plan ready in minutes.
faq_getting_started_q2: How are my daily calorie and macro targets calculated?
faq_getting_started_a2: We use scientifically-backed formulas including your age, gender, height, weight, activity level, and health goals (lose, gain, or maintain weight) to calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE). Your targets are then customized based on your specific goals.
faq_getting_started_q3: Can I update my health goals later?
faq_getting_started_a3: Absolutely! You can update your profile and health goals anytime through your account settings. Your nutrition targets will automatically recalculate based on your new information.
faq_pricing_q1: What subscription plans do you offer?
faq_pricing_a1: We offer two flexible plans: Weekly (QAR 29/week) for those who want to try our service, and Monthly (QAR 89/month) which offers better value with a 23% savings. Both plans include access to all partner restaurants and personalized meal planning.
faq_pricing_q2: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq_pricing_a2: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. We don't offer refunds for partial periods.
faq_pricing_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_pricing_a3: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), debit cards, and digital payment methods. All payments are processed securely through our payment partner.
faq_pricing_a4: While we don't offer a traditional free trial, our weekly plan is a great low-commitment way to try the service. You can cancel anytime if it's not right for you.
faq_meals_a1: Browse our partner restaurants, filter by dietary preferences, and select meals that fit your nutrition goals. Schedule your meals for breakfast, lunch, or dinner on your preferred dates, and we'll handle the rest!
faq_meals_q2: Can I filter meals by dietary restrictions?
faq_meals_a2: Yes! We offer extensive dietary filters including Keto, Vegan, Vegetarian, Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Low-Carb, High-Protein, and more. You can set your preferences in your profile for personalized recommendations.
faq_meals_q3: How far in advance can I schedule meals?
faq_meals_a3: You can schedule meals up to 2 weeks in advance. We recommend scheduling at least 24 hours ahead to ensure restaurant availability and timely preparation.
faq_meals_q4: What if I need to cancel or modify an order?
faq_meals_a4: Orders can be modified or cancelled up to 24 hours before the scheduled delivery time. After that, the meal credit may be forfeited. Contact our support team for assistance with last-minute changes.
faq_meals_q5: How many meals can I order per week?
faq_meals_a5: The number of meals depends on your subscription plan. Check your subscription details in your account to see your weekly meal allowance. Unused meals don't roll over to the next week.
faq_delivery_a1: Delivery hours vary by restaurant partner, but typically we deliver between 7 AM and 9 PM. You'll see available delivery windows when scheduling your meals.
faq_delivery_a2: Yes! Once your order is confirmed and out for delivery, you can track its status in real-time through the Delivery Tracking page in your account.
faq_delivery_q3: What areas do you deliver to?
faq_delivery_a3: We currently deliver within a 10-mile radius of our partner restaurants. Enter your address during signup to see available restaurants in your area.
faq_delivery_a4: No, delivery is completely FREE on all orders! We believe healthy eating should be accessible to everyone, so we cover all delivery costs. No minimum order value required.
faq_nutrition_q1: How accurate is the nutritional information?
faq_nutrition_a1: Nutritional information is provided by our partner restaurants and calculated based on standard serving sizes. While we strive for accuracy, actual values may vary slightly. Use the information as a guideline for your nutrition planning.
faq_nutrition_q2: Can I track my progress over time?
faq_nutrition_a2: Yes! Our Progress page shows detailed charts of your calorie intake, macronutrient breakdown, and weight changes over time. You can log your daily weight and see trends to stay motivated.
faq_nutrition_q3: Is the nutrition advice from a professional?
faq_nutrition_a3: Our calorie and macro calculations are based on established nutritional science and formulas. However, this is not medical advice. For specific health concerns or conditions, please consult a registered dietitian or healthcare provider.
faq_nutrition_a4: We provide allergen information for all meals when available. However, meals are prepared in commercial kitchens that may handle common allergens. If you have severe allergies, please contact the restaurant directly before ordering.
faq_account_q1: How do I reset my password?
faq_account_a1: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email address. We'll send you a secure link to reset your password. The link expires after 24 hours for security.
faq_account_q2: How can I contact customer support?
faq_account_a2: You can reach our support team through the Support page in your account, by emailing support@nutribox.com, or by calling our helpline. We typically respond within 24 hours.
faq_account_q3: Can I have multiple delivery addresses?
faq_account_a3: Yes! You can save multiple addresses (home, work, etc.) in your account and select the appropriate one when scheduling each meal delivery.
faq_account_q4: How do I refer a friend?
faq_account_a4: Visit the Affiliate Program in your account to get your unique referral code. When friends sign up using your code and place orders, you earn commissions automatically!
faq_find_answers: Find answers to common questions about NUTRIO. Can't find what you're looking for?
faq_support_team: Our support team is here to help you with any questions or concerns.
privacy_intro_text: Welcome to NutriBox ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our meal planning and delivery service.
privacy_info_collect_text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
privacy_info_collect_item_1: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number)
privacy_info_collect_item_3: Health and dietary information (age, weight, height, health goals, dietary preferences)
privacy_info_collect_item_5: Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
privacy_info_use_text: We use the information we collect to:
privacy_info_use_item_2: Process and fulfill your meal orders
privacy_info_use_item_3: Personalize meal recommendations based on your health goals
privacy_info_use_item_4: Calculate nutritional targets and track your progress
privacy_info_use_item_5: Send order confirmations and delivery updates
privacy_info_use_item_8: Improve our services and develop new features
privacy_sharing_text: We may share your information with:
privacy_sharing_item_1: Restaurant Partners: To prepare and fulfill your orders
privacy_sharing_item_2: Delivery Services: To deliver your meals
privacy_sharing_item_3: Payment Processors: To process transactions securely
privacy_sharing_item_4: Service Providers: Who assist in operating our platform
privacy_sharing_item_5: Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights
privacy_sharing_no_sell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy_security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption, secure servers, and regular security assessments. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_retention_text: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes, such as resolving disputes and enforcing our agreements.
privacy_rights_text: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy_rights_item_1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy_rights_item_4: Object to or restrict processing of your information
privacy_rights_contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@nutribox.com.
privacy_cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage patterns, and deliver personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy_children_text: Our service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.
privacy_changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy_contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
privacy_contact_address: Address: 123 Healthy Street, Wellness City, WC 12345
terms_account_must: To use our Service, you must:
terms_account_item_1: Be at least 18 years of age
terms_account_item_2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms_account_item_3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms_account_item_4: Promptly update any changes to your information
terms_account_item_5: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
terms_account_terminate: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
